title: MIDE-104 School Girls Les ● Puwa ● Yui Azuchi
overview: Yui Azuchi is MOODYZ's immortal Ryo ● The ban is lifted for the first time! Yui, a high school girl who is about to take the entrance exam next year, is pressured by her mother in the educational complex to pass the difficult exam, and she cheats unintentionally. Yui, who was threatened by two classmates who witnessed it, was raped by the vice president who was irritated and asked for help from that day, and finally five classmates The days when I'm in a circle ... Even if I cry or scream, the nightmarish days continue ...
